query: SELECT quoteName, pickType, palletSupplyFee, shrinkWrapFee, labelingFee, orderProcessingFee, cancellationFee, casePickRate, layerPickRate, freightLanes, quoteValidDays, paymentTerms, minimumCommitment, customDisclosures FROM savedQuotes WHERE quoteName = 'Cornerstone Systems - Warehouse Services - 2/17/2026';
